{
  "current_life_events": "The user received a surprise bill for a leaky roof repair that just finished, adding $1,200 to her monthly expenses. She also has a looming tax filing deadline next week and a freelance client that needs a financial report by Friday. On top of her full-time accountant job, she's juggling the freelance work and trying to keep her household budget on track.",
  "mental_state": "Feeling stretched thin and anxious about the mounting bills, yet determined to keep everything under control.",

  "why_bringing_these_up_now": "The unexpected home repair expense and the pressure of meeting deadlines have made financial and work stress immediate concerns, while the sleepless nights from worry prompted her to seek support today."
}
